# Pediatric Admission Template
Copy and paste this template to quickly generate a pediatric admission note.

```text
pt [] M wt[]
alg nil
cc fever and cough
hpi 
pmh fully immunized
sx fever++ cough+ oral_intake_reduced+ vomiting-
vitals hr[] rr[] spo2[] temp[]
pe general:active well_hydrated rs:clear cvs:s1s2
ix hb[] wbc[] crp[]
ix cxr:wnl
dx Viral Upper Respiratory Infection
rx paracetamol []mg tds po
```
